A number of high-profile insiders and leakers have suggested it'll be next year before we get another peak at the Gen 10 titles, which are officially announced for 2027 but nothing more specific behind that. Hopefully, when the games are shown off again, we'll have a nice new Eeveelution or two as well.

results.title: Chinese Pokemon Eeveelution Terastal Grand Gathering Release Revealed — Japan2UK
results.content:
The Chinese-exclusive Sylveon ex SAR also gives the release something of its own rather than simply feeling like another version of a set we have already seen. That is what makes this one particularly interesting. It has the familiarity of Terastal Festival ex, but with enough unique Chinese product elements to make it feel fresh.

Chinese Pokemon TCG is not messing around with this Eeveelution release.

Whether you call it Blooming Legends, Terastal Grand Gathering, or just the new Chinese Eeveelution special release, the direction is clear: this is one of the biggest Eevee-focused product waves we have seen for 2026. [...] When does the new Chinese Eeveelution set release?

The new Chinese Eeveelution special release is currently expected to release on 12th June 2026. As always with these international Pokemon releases, dates and product details can sometimes shift around slightly depending on region, distribution and how quickly information gets translated across collector circles, but this is the date being reported from the current product information. results.title: Pokemon Theory Predicts New Eevee Evolution for Winds and Waves
results.content:
pokemon camera description target

With no new official news to go by, Pokemon fans will no doubt be analyzing the trailer and looking for any other clues about what the games might entail. One theory making the rounds on social media is that Pokemon Winds and Waves will feature a new Eevee evolution, based on a Target description of an Instant Print Digital Camera. The camera features art of Eevee and its evolutions on its shell, and the description describes them as the "currently discovered" Eeveelutions. The wording clearly leaves the door open for more Eevee evolutions to be discovered, leaving some fans to think that it's a deliberate clue that more are going to be introduced when Winds and Waves launch in 2027. [...] No new information on Pokemon WInds and Waves has been released since Pokemon Day. And even though a Nintendo Direct is rumored to be right around the corner, reputable leakers have suggested that Pokemon Winds and Waves won't be featured at the show. In fact, it's been suggested that there will be no new Pokemon Winds and Waves updates for the rest of 2026.

pokemon anime pikachu 

##### Pokemon x Target 30th Anniversary Collection is Officially Coming Back With Brand-New Items

More Pokemon 30th Anniversary items are coming to Target, with brand-new items available for fans to purchase soon.

By  Dalton Cooper

## Pokemon Camera Description Has Fans Thinking a New Eeveelution is on the Way

pokemon camera description target [...] Sign in to your GameRant account

There hasn't been a new Eevee evolution since Pokemon X and Y released all the way back in 2013, but some fans are theorizing that a new one might finally be making its debut as part of the Generation 10 games, Pokemon Winds and Waves. Pokemon Winds and Waves were revealed at the last Pokemon Day event with an impressive trailer showing their graphical improvements over their predecessors. The trailer revealed the starter Pokemon that will be featured in Pokemon Winds and Waves, as well as the games' 2027 release window.

results.title: 30 Years After Pokémon Red and Blue, Japan Officially Crowns No. 1 Pokémon in Latest Rankings
results.content:
With 90 collective votes, Eevee and its evolution line are the only Pokémon that came close to challenging Pikachu, Pichu and Raichu's throne. Comparatively, third-place winners Charmader, Charmeleon and Charizard only amassed 58 votes in the ranking. Introduced in Generation I, Eevee is famous for its ability to evolve into one of eight different forms, each of which represents a uniquePokémon type. The most recent addition to the Eevee family is the fairy-type Sylveon, which debuted in Generation VI. [...] Notably, many comments submitted by "Eeveeolution" fans highlighted the appeal of all eight forms rather than any one form over the others. "No matter what they evolve into, all Eeveelutions are cute," one voter stated. Eevee's first form is equally favored and frequently appears alongside Pikachu as an ambassador for Pokémon's civic projects in Japan. As one voter pointed out, an Eevee sculpture is located immediately outside the entrance to Yokohama's City Hall.

Pokopia is available now exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2. For viewers in the U.S., Pokémon Horizons is streaming on Netflix.

results.title: Know before you GO to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo, Chicago, and Copenhagen
results.content:
Mega Mewtwo Collection in collaboration with 100 Thieves: The collection includes hoodies, trucker hats, and t-shirts featuring Mega Mewtwo X and Mega Mewtwo Y. This collection is exclusively available at GO Fest: Chicago at both the pop-up at Grant Park and the boutique at NEWCITY.
 Pokémon GO Historical Collection: Revisit all ten GO Fest artworks in a limited-edition collection of GO Fest shirts, pins, postcards, and more!
 Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Collection: Celebrate ten years of Pokémon GO and the joyous friendships found along the way. Artwork featuring Pikachu and Eevee is available as a challenge coin, lapel pin, and T-shirt. Limited quantities are available for preorder. [...] During your park session, Trainers can look forward to Special Research connected to the recent discovery of Zeraora, four skill-based park zones, Team GO Rocket battles, Shadow Raids, themed research, photo opportunities, and more.

Be sure to stay through the end of your park session! During the final 30 minutes, ticket-holding attendees will be able to join a massive Super Mega Raid featuring Mega Mewtwo X and Mega Mewtwo Y. The Mewtwo that Trainers can catch from these raids will have a Pokémon GO Fest 2026 Location Background, and its first Mega Level will already be unlocked. Stay tuned for more information on your assigned location by checking in-game news or the email associated with your Pokémon GO account. [...] The Raid Lover add-on grants additional Raid Passes per day during the event, as well as additional XP and Candy when completing raids.
 The Egg-thusiast add-on grants bonuses for hatching Pokémon, an increased chance at receiving 10 km Eggs from spinning PokéStops and Gyms, and 1/4 Egg Hatch Distance for Eggs placed in Incubators during the event.
 The Citywide Gameplay add-on extends the Pokémon GO Fest fun throughout the city on the extra day—or days—of your choice!
 The Premier Access add-on includes 100 Premier Battle Passes, 100 Super Incubators and more in-game items. Also get access to an exclusive Premier Access Lounge onsite with upgraded restrooms, portable charger kiosks, and lockers.

## Gift Box Set

Contains eight packs, an album, and a 64 pack of sleeves.

## "Eevee & Friends" Gift Box

Contains 15 packs, an Espeon ex promo, an Umbreon ex promo, a playmat, a playmat storage case, a deck box with one card divider, a pack of 64 card sleeves, a damage counter case, 9 damage-counter dice, a coin flip dice, a metal magnetic coin, a Poison marker, and a Burn marker.

## Pin Sets

Each box contains a booster pack and a pin. There are 81 different pin designs in total, comprising 8 standard designs and 1 secret design per Pokemon. The probability of obtaining a secret design is 1%.

## Quicksand Card Display Charm Gift Boxes

Each box includes two booster packs, an Eeveelution card, and a card display frame that has liquid / glitter inside that you can shake ("quicksand").

By
Eric Zeman [...] ## Season 1: Indigo League

Things get confusing right out of the gate with how to deal with the start of the show. The first season, retroactively titled Indigo League, ran for 80 episodes. However, it seems to now be split into two. The first 57 episodes are marketed under The Beginning banner, while the remaining episodes are folded into Season 2 on Amazon and YouTube. For accuracy's sake, I'll be sticking to the 80-episode format here. Set in the Kanto region, you can play here in Let's Go Eevee/Pikachu, Pokopia, and the newly re-released FireRed and LeafGreen games.
